zh.of Boscombe, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾波斯可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Darrell於1490年出生在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利時，她的父親Sir Edward Darell25歲，母親Jane Croft20歲。她於1510年之後與Sir Anthony Hungerford在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Darrell于1490年出生在英国維爾爾拉姆斯波利时，她的父亲Sir Edward Darell25岁，母亲Jane Croft20岁。她于1510年之后与Sir Anthony Hungerford在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Darrell was born in 1490, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Edward Darell, was 25 and her mother, Jane Croft, was 20. She married Sir Anthony Hungerford after 1510, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1550, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Darrell est née en 1490, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Darell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Croft, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Anthony Hungerford après 1510, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1550, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Jane Darrell 1490 in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Darell 25 und ihre Mutter Jane Croft 20. Sie hat nach 1510 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Anthony Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Darrell è nata il nel 1490 nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Darell, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane Croft, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Anthony Hungerford dopo il 1510, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1550, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Darrellが1490年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Darellは25歳，母Jane Croftは20歳であった。1510年以後にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSir Anthony Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Darrell(이)가 1490년 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Darell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Croft(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1510년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Sir Anthony Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Darrell nasceu em 1490, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Darell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Croft, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Anthony Hungerford após 1510, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1550, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Darrell родилась в 1490 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Darell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Croft, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Anthony Hungerford после 1510 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1550 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Jane Darrell nació en 1490, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Darell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane Croft, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Anthony Hungerford después de 1510, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1550, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
